title: Ipc Message Envelope
description: Electron renderer code calls main-process kernel operations asynchronously; ad hoc IPC shapes make correlation and errors easy to lose. This spec defines a structured request/response envelope with correlation ids and typed failure propagation between preload, main, and UI hooks.
context: Electron renderer code calls main-process kernel operations asynchronously; ad hoc IPC shapes make correlation and errors easy to lose. This spec defines a structured request/response envelope with correlation ids and typed failure propagation between preload, main, and UI hooks.

rules: Every IPC request envelope MUST include a unique `id` echoed on the response so the renderer can match async replies.

rules.requirement: errors propagate as structured failure envelopes
rules: Failures MUST NOT be silent: the response envelope MUST include an error shape compatible with UI error handling (message + optional code).

constraints: HTTP handlers MUST NOT import @specd/core from @specd/ui or @specd/client.
v1 server auth: api.auth.type from specd.yaml (never studio.*); registry registers only disabled; no server-side Bearer enforcement on loopback or specd ui serve.
Artifact save/load MUST use core:save-change-artifact and core:get-change-artifact — not raw ChangeRepository.saveArtifact from HTTP handlers.
There is no GET /changes/{name}/validation resource; use GET .../status and POST .../validate.
Canonical workspace spec artifacts are read-only in Studio v1.

scenarios.name: Renderer assigns correlation id per invoke
then: AND main logs can trace request

scenarios.name: Duplicate id rejected in dev builds
when: two in-flight invokes reuse same id

scenarios.requirement: errors propagate as structured failure envelopes
scenarios.name: Kernel error maps to failure envelope
then: AND code and message fields present

scenarios.requirement: errors propagate as structured failure envelopes
scenarios.name: Renderer rejects promise with typed error

scenarios.requirement: errors propagate as structured failure envelopes
scenarios.name: Success envelope bypasses error mapper
